---
title: "Tau Mutant Integration"
format:
  html:
    theme: theme.scss        # deep-blue chrome + IBM Plex (Sans body, Serif headings, Mono code; inlined offline)
    embed-resources: true    # inline CSS/JS -> ONE self-contained offline HTML file
    lightbox: auto           # dense figures are clickable in the offline HTML
    toc: true
    code-fold: true          # each echoed chunk -> native <details> "Code" toggle (offline HTML, no JS); include:false setup stays hidden
    code-tools: true         # top-right menu: expand/collapse ALL code blocks + view source
execute:
  echo: true                 # show plotting code as folded/togglable blocks; figures, captions, headings remain the default view
---

{{< include _qc.qmd >}}

{{< include _story.qmd >}}

{{< include _microglia.qmd >}}

{{< include _trajectory.qmd >}}

{{< include _mechanism.qmd >}}

{{< include _crossmodality.qmd >}}
